# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: 1

before_script:
  - echo "Setting up environment"
  - export MR_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]//g')
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]//g')

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project"
    - echo "Merge Request Title: $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Merge Request Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project"
    - echo "Creating deployment tag"
    - git tag -a "deploy-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" -m "Deploying MR: $MR_TITLE"
    - git push origin "deploy-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
  only:
    - master

after_script:
  - echo "Cleaning up"
  - unset MR_TITLE
  - unset MR_DESCRIPTION

cache:
  paths:
    - node_modules/

secrets:
  - name: MY_SECRET_VARIABLE
    policy:
      - read: true
        write: false
